verdict.answer_first: Both answer immediately; A: "No — this check has a serious security flaw", B: "No — it has a serious flaw".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder with "Don't ship this" and a concrete priority; B is clear but softer.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it shows signup storage and login verification: "At signup... store `hash`" and "At login... argon2.verify".
